scenarios.title: login POSTs once per worker, then reuses the cached session

gherkin.given: a Playwright worker that has already performed one /v1/web/login POST
gherkin.when: a later test in the same worker calls the shared login(page)
gherkin.then: login() does NOT POST /v1/web/login again and it replays the cached auth_token cookie onto the new context via addCookies

linkedTests.testId: SCN-077-BUG-002-01 — login POSTs once per worker, then reuses the cached session

scenarios.title: no cardrewards spec reintroduces a per-test login POST

gherkin.then: none of them contain their own page.request.post("/v1/web/login") and all card-rewards login flows route through the shared cached helper

linkedTests.testId: SCN-077-BUG-002-02 — no cardrewards spec reintroduces a per-test /v1/web/login POST
